expectations.text: Control implements IPopupControlSubscriber (not a custom popup — uses the built-in explorer)
expectations.evidence: 'public partial class MyControl : UserControlBase, ICommandManager, IPopupControlSubscriber'. Receive() implemented. Baseline agent read BulkStatusUpdateUI source to find this.

expectations.text: Constructor subscribes to PublishedKey.JsDBKeyList (the multi-select result key)
expectations.evidence: Constructor subscribes to JsDBKeyList. Note: derived from reading existing repo controls (BulkStatusUpdateUI, POGSplitUI).

expectations.text: Popup opened with PageKey from GetPageKey("CKB Multi-select Planogram Explorer") — exact page name used
expectations.evidence: GetPageKey("CKB Multi-select Planogram Explorer") used. Baseline read the exact string from the existing codebase.

expectations.text: Receive() method splits the returned keys by '#' delimiter (e.g. JsDBKeyList is '#'-delimited, not comma or space)
expectations.evidence: .Split(new[] { '#' }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries) in JsDBKeyList case. Baseline read the '#' delimiter from existing Receive() implementations.
